Deprecated API

Contents

  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    javolution.testing.TestContext.assertEquals(double, double)
    Use assertEquals(expected, actual, delta) instead
    javolution.testing.TestContext.assertEquals(double, double, CharSequence)
    Use assertEquals(expected, actual, delta, message) instead
    javolution.io.UTF8ByteBufferWriter.setByteBuffer(ByteBuffer)
    Replaced by UTF8ByteBufferWriter.setOutput(ByteBuffer)
    javolution.io.UTF8ByteBufferReader.setByteBuffer(ByteBuffer)
    Replaced by UTF8ByteBufferReader.setInput(ByteBuffer)
    javolution.io.UTF8StreamReader.setInputStream(InputStream)
    Replaced by UTF8StreamReader.setInput(InputStream)
    javolution.io.UTF8StreamWriter.setOutputStream(OutputStream)
    Replaced by UTF8StreamWriter.setOutput(OutputStream)
    javolution.util.FastMap.setShared(boolean)
    Replaced by FastMap.shared()
